mapper.select: SELECT * FROM posts WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET visible = #{visible}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status != 'deleted'
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.title, p.slug, p.description, p.tags, p.img_urls AS imgUrls, u.avatar AS authorAvatar, u.nickname AS authorNickname, u.tags_json AS authorTagJson, p.publish_time AS publishTime, p.is_top AS isTop FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.creator_id = u.id WHERE p.status = 'published' AND p.visible = 'public' ORDER BY p.publish_time DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.slug, p.description, p.tags, p.img_urls AS imgUrls, u.avatar AS authorAvatar, u.nickname AS authorNickname, u.tags_json AS authorTagJson, p.publish_time AS publishTime, p.is_top AS isTop FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.creator_id = u.id WHERE p.status = 'published' AND p.visible = 'public' AND ( p.publish_time < #{cursorTime} OR (p.publish_time = #{cursorTime} AND p.id < #{cursorId}) ) ORDER BY p.publish_time DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.slug, p.description, p.tags, p.img_urls AS imgUrls, u.avatar AS authorAvatar, u.nickname AS authorNickname, u.tags_json AS authorTagJson, p.publish_time AS publishTime, p.is_top AS isTop FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.creator_id = u.id WHERE p.status = 'published' AND p.visible = 'public' AND p.publish_time >= #{since} ORDER BY p.publish_time DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE status = 'published' AND visible = 'public' AND publish_time >= #{since}

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.slug, p.description, p.tags, p.img_urls AS imgUrls, u.avatar AS authorAvatar, u.nickname AS authorNickname, u.tags_json AS authorTagJson, p.publish_time AS publishTime, p.is_top AS isTop FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.creator_id = u.id WHERE p.status = 'published' AND p.visible = 'public' AND p.creator_id = #{creatorId} ORDER BY p.publish_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.slug, p.description, p.tags, p.img_urls AS imgUrls, u.avatar AS authorAvatar, u.nickname AS authorNickname, u.tags_json AS authorTagJson, p.publish_time AS publishTime, p.is_top AS isTop FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.creator_id = u.id WHERE p.creator_id = #{creatorId} AND p.status = 'published' ORDER BY p.is_top DESC, p.publish_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT p.id, p.creator_id AS creatorId, p.title, p.slug, p.description, p.tags, p.img_urls AS imgUrls, p.content_url AS contentUrl, p.content_etag AS contentEtag, p.content_sha256 AS contentSha256, u.avatar AS authorAvatar, u.nickname AS authorNickname, u.tags_json AS authorTagJson, p.publish_time AS publishTime, p.is_top AS isTop, p.visible, p.type, p.status FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.creator_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id}

SELECT p.id, p.creator_id AS creatorId, p.title, p.slug, p.description, p.tags, p.img_urls AS imgUrls, p.content_url AS contentUrl, p.content_etag AS contentEtag, p.content_sha256 AS contentSha256, u.avatar AS authorAvatar, u.nickname AS authorNickname, u.tags_json AS authorTagJson, p.publish_time AS publishTime, p.is_top AS isTop, p.visible, p.type, p.status FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.creator_id = u.id WHERE p.slug = #{slug} AND p.status = 'published' AND p.visible = 'public'
SELECT id FROM posts WHERE slug = #{slug} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM posts WHERE creator_id = #{creatorId} AND status = 'published'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM posts WHERE creator_id = #{creatorId} AND status = 'published' AND visible = 'public'
SELECT id FROM posts WHERE creator_id = #{creatorId} AND status = 'published'
